languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest steadily exhales and opens an eye.{/n} "You are correct, Nuncius, I risk boring the Rogue Trader with my protracted ruminations. However, I will not allow the semantic analysis of my utterance to go unanswered — I will log your thesis for further debate. Now it is time to make my obeisance."

languages.text: {n}Техножрец мерно выдыхает и открывает глаз.{/n} "Ты прав, Нунциус, я рискую утомить {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольного Торговца{/g} своими пространными размышлениями. Однако же я не оставлю семантический анализ моего изречения без ответа – я залогирую твои тезисы для дальнейших дебатов. А теперь пора воздать почести".

traits.locale_text: {n}Техножрец мерно выдыхает и открывает глаз.{/n} "Ты прав, Нунциус, я рискую утомить {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольного Торговца{/g} своими пространными размышлениями. Однако же я не оставлю семантический анализ моего изречения без ответа – я залогирую твои тезисы для дальнейших дебатов. А теперь пора воздать почести".

languages.text: {n}テクプリストはゆっくりと息を吐き、目を覚ます。{/n}「君が言う通りだ、ヌンシウス。私の長文の思考は、ローグトレーダーに退屈を招くかもしれない。しかし、私の発言の語彙分析に答えることは許されない。君の主張は、今後の議論のために記録する。さて、礼拝の時間が来た」
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest steadily exhales and opens an eye.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius, I risk boring the Rogue Trader with my protracted ruminations. However, I will not allow the semantic analysis of my utterance to go unanswered — I will log your thesis for further debate. Now it is time to make my obeisance."

languages.text: {n}Der Techpriester atmet langsam aus und öffnet ein Auge.{/n} "Ihr habt recht, Nuncius, ich laufe Gefahr, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin}{/g} mit meinen langweiligen Grübeleien zu langweilen. Allerdings lasse ich nicht zu, dass die semantische Analyse meiner Aussage unbeantwortet bleibt ... ich werde Eure These für weitere Debatten notieren. Damit empfehle ich mich."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest steadily exhales and opens an eye.{/n} "You are correct, Nuncius, I risk boring the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} with my protracted ruminations. However, I will not allow the semantic analysis of my utterance to go unanswered — I will log your thesis for further debate. Now it is time to make my obeisance."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Techpriester atmet langsam aus und öffnet ein Auge.{/n} "Ihr habt recht, Nuncius, ich laufe Gefahr, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin}{/g} mit meinen langweiligen Grübeleien zu langweilen. Allerdings lasse ich nicht zu, dass die semantische Analyse meiner Aussage unbeantwortet bleibt ... ich werde Eure These für weitere Debatten notieren. Damit empfehle ich mich."

languages.text: {n}El tecnosacerdote emite una prolongada exhalación y abre un ojo.{/n} «Tienes razón, Nuncius, me arriesgo a aburrir {mf|al|a la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g} con mis reflexiones. Aun así, no permitiré que el análisis semántico de mi declaración quede sin respuesta: tomaré nota de esa tesis para un debate ulterior. Ahora he de presentar mis respetos».
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest steadily exhales and opens an eye.{/n} "You are correct, Nuncius, I risk boring the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} with my protracted ruminations. However, I will not allow the semantic analysis of my utterance to go unanswered — I will log your thesis for further debate. Now it is time to make my obeisance."

Aun así, no permitiré que el análisis semántico de mi declaración quede sin respuesta: tomaré nota de esa tesis para un debate ulterior. Ahora he de presentar mis respetos».

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip, sakince nefes verip gözünü açıyor.{/n} "Haklısın Nuncius, uzatmalı düşüncelerimle {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g}'i sıkma riskine giriyorum. Ancak ifademin anlamsal analizinin cevapsız kalmasına izin vermeyeceğim. Tezini daha sonra tartışmak üzere kaydedeceğim. Şimdi itaatimi sunma vakti."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest steadily exhales and opens an eye.{/n} "You are correct, Nuncius, I risk boring the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} with my protracted ruminations. However, I will not allow the semantic analysis of my utterance to go unanswered — I will log your thesis for further debate. Now it is time to make my obeisance."

Ancak ifademin anlamsal analizinin cevapsız kalmasına izin vermeyeceğim. Tezini daha sonra tartışmak üzere kaydedeceğim. Şimdi itaatimi sunma vakti."

languages.text: {n}Le technoprêtre expire lentement en ouvrant un œil.{/n} « Tu as raison, Nuncius. Il ne faudrait pas ennuyer {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}{/g} avec mes interminables ruminations. Comme je refuse néanmoins de laisser l'analyse sémantique de mes propos sans réponse, je prends bonne note de votre thèse et m'assurerai d'en débattre plus tard. Il est temps pour moi de présenter mes respects. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest steadily exhales and opens an eye.{/n} "You are correct, Nuncius, I risk boring the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} with my protracted ruminations. However, I will not allow the semantic analysis of my utterance to go unanswered — I will log your thesis for further debate. Now it is time to make my obeisance."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le technoprêtre expire lentement en ouvrant un œil.{/n} « Tu as raison, Nuncius. Il ne faudrait pas ennuyer {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}{/g} avec mes interminables ruminations. Comme je refuse néanmoins de laisser l'analyse sémantique de mes propos sans réponse, je prends bonne note de votre thèse et m'assurerai d'en débattre plus tard. Il est temps pour moi de présenter mes respects. »

languages.text: {n}技术神甫缓缓呼出一口气，睁开一只眼睛。{/n}“你说得对，努恩修斯，我冗长的沉思恐令{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}生厌。不过，我不会对这番语义分析置之不理——我将记录你的论点以供后续辩论。此刻请让我献上我的敬意。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest steadily exhales and opens an eye.{/n} "You are correct, Nuncius, I risk boring the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} with my protracted ruminations. However, I will not allow the semantic analysis of my utterance to go unanswered — I will log your thesis for further debate. Now it is time to make my obeisance."
